_comment: Default MCP servers bundled with Ember. User ~/.ember/mcp.json and project .ember/mcp.json take precedence.

scaffold.description: Curated project scaffolding and post-setup handoff generation.
scaffold._comment: Deterministic project scaffolding for coordinator, director, and ops. Coordinators can scaffold first and then hand off when deeper implementation is needed.

playwright.description: Browser automation for login flows, interaction, screenshots, and verification.
playwright._comment: Override headless/headed per environment via project .ember/mcp.json. Add --no-sandbox in Docker/CI. Add --caps vision for screenshot-heavy flows.

desktop.description: Cross-platform desktop automation for screenshots, app launching, focus, keyboard, and mouse control.
desktop._comment: Desktop capabilities vary by OS and local permissions. Call describe_environment first to learn the active surface.

filesystem.description: Workspace filesystem access for direct file inspection and edits alongside Ember's native file tools.
filesystem._comment: Uses the workspace root as the allowed filesystem root. Terminal access remains available via Ember's native terminal tool.
